extraSources.name: AIMA — Agency for Integration, Migration & Asylum

requirements.label: Admission to a Portuguese institution
requirements.detail: Acceptance/enrolment at a recognised Portuguese higher-education institution.

requirements.label: Means of subsistence
requirements.detail: Show means tied to the Portuguese minimum wage (about €760/month, ≈ €9,120/year); the exact figure tracks the current minimum wage.

requirements.label: Health insurance
requirements.detail: Travel/health insurance valid in Portugal for the D4 visa period.

requirements.label: Language proof
requirements.detail: Portuguese for Portuguese-taught programmes, or IELTS/TOEFL for English-taught.

requirements.label: Valid passport
requirements.detail: A passport valid for the D4 visa period.

requirements.label: Proof of accommodation
requirements.detail: Evidence of accommodation in Portugal is usually requested.

requirements.label: Tuition / funds transfer
requirements.detail: Transfer fees or living funds with a low-FX provider.

requirements.label: Connectivity on arrival
requirements.detail: An eSIM gives you a Portuguese number and data on landing.
